config.comments.bot_web.enable_https: Whether to enable HTTPS protocol security measures.
config.comments.bot_web.web_host: The host address of the Web service. Setting to 0.0.0.0 will listen to all addresses.
config.comments.bot_web.web_port: The port number of the Web service. Setting to 0 will disable the service.
config.comments.bot_web.login_max_attemp: Maximum number of login requests limit.
config.comments.bot_web.heartbeat_attemp: The number of attempts to send heartbeat messages.
config.comments.bot_web.heartbeat_interv: The interval for sending heartbeat messages.
config.comments.bot_web_secret.allow_ori: The list of allowed CORS origins for the API service.
config.comments.bot_web_secret.jwt_secre: The authentication key for the built-in API, for signing and verifying validity.
